items.example: A typical day for me starts at 6 a.m.
She teaches English at a secondary school.
I love the fresh air in the park in the morning.
Driving during rush hour is very stressful.
The bus journey to school takes 40 minutes.
She reviews her lesson plan on the bus.
Teachers prepare lesson plans before class.
Curious students ask many questions.
She is very hardworking and never misses class.
The students are doing a reading exercise.
He rarely watches TV on weekdays.
She works five days a week on weekdays.
She has a simple breakfast every morning.
I buy groceries at the market after work.
She helps her daughter with homework every evening.
She has lunch with her colleagues at noon.
She manages her time well every day.
Being organized helps you have a productive day.
She has a very productive morning routine.
It is hard to concentrate when you are tired.
She lives in a quiet district of the city.
There is a park nearby where she walks every morning.
Exercise is part of her daily routine.
She uses public transport to get to work.
She spends time reading before going to bed.
